description_long: This ottoman features a robust, rectangular wooden structure with a dark, weathered finish, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The top surface is composed of several wide wooden planks, closely fitted together, providing a broad and flat area suitable for sitting or placing objects. The base consists of a central pedestal with ornate, carved detailing, which transitions into a wide, stepped plinth for stability. The sides of the ottoman reveal a solid, block-like construction with no visible cushioning or upholstery, emphasizing its utilitarian and durable design. The wood grain and texture are prominent, adding visual interest and a tactile quality to the surface. This piece would fit well in urban parks, plazas, or communal outdoor spaces where both function and aesthetic appeal are valued.
description: A large, rectangular wooden ottoman with a rustic, plank-style top and a sturdy, carved pedestal base. The dark wood finish and solid construction make it suitable for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow end of the ottoman, highlighting the plank top and the central pedestal base with carved details.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the ottoman, the wide plank surface, and the broad, stable base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite narrow end and the same pedestal and plinth structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the full length, plank surface, and the solid, blocky base.
attribute_leg_design: central carved pedestal with wide plinth base
